description: Research Etsy products, shops, and keywords from EverBee in a repeatable agent-ready workflow.

novel_features.name: Opportunity Shortlist
novel_features.description: Rank Etsy product opportunities by combining product analytics, keyword demand, competition, and local trend history.

novel_features.name: Niche Score
novel_features.description: Score a niche by weighing search demand, competition, product saturation, pricing, and trend movement.

novel_features.name: Shop Gaps
novel_features.description: Find competitor shop openings from product mix, pricing bands, tags, and keyword coverage.

novel_features.name: Tag Gap
novel_features.description: Compare winning listing tags against a target shop or keyword set to reveal missing SEO coverage.

novel_features.name: Keyword Clusters
novel_features.description: Group related keyword suggestions by term overlap, demand, competition, and opportunity score.

novel_features.name: Trend Diff
novel_features.description: Compare saved research snapshots to show which products, shops, or keywords moved over time.

novel_features.name: Competitor Watch
novel_features.description: Detect competitor changes in top products, price bands, and tags across saved shop snapshots.

novel_features.name: Listing Audit
novel_features.description: Audit a listing's keyword and tag fit using EverBee-derived product and keyword context.
